preconditions: the controlled release block is the only mutable README identity surface
mutable refs are descriptive metadata only
Git and GitHub observations are collected before policy evaluation
the state file is local-only and the side effect has been independently observed
all required job names are known
the GitHub Release remains draft until all assets are downloaded
the release tarball was redownloaded and byte-verified
the auditor rereads raw Git, GitHub, asset and install observations

values.reason: mutable ref is not a frozen commit id

preconditions: a mutable symbolic ref must be rejected before any build read
a 40-hex object that is not a commit must be rejected
validation runs before target creation or member write
symbolic and hard links are forbidden before extraction
PAX path overrides are validated before extraction
duplicate normalized member paths are rejected before extraction
fixed archive limits cannot be relaxed by caller input
all lock identity fields are read back before remote mutation
main drift fails before tag, release, asset, main or install mutation
absent permits create, exact permits adopt, and any identity drift is conflict
published exact may be adopted only with a durable matching prior intent
CI evidence must bind exact candidate SHA, approved workflow identity and all required jobs
self-reported local success cannot override checkpoint and live identity evidence
all existing ancestors are inspected without following a symlink into the write path

values.content_class: authorization bearer plus synthetic secret-shaped fixture

preconditions: public files are scanned before bundle or release publication
absolute home fixture is assembled at runtime and local evidence paths are forbidden on the public surface
manifest, asset digest and bytes are verified before target creation
destination containment is verified before any directory or file write
published Release immutability is an independent close gate
v* tag update and deletion protection are independent close gates
operation IDs and intent IDs must match the exact x-operation-plan
renumbering a reversed operation list must not make it valid
passed checkpoint keys must be the continuous CP00 through current prefix
phase must be the exact milestone mapped from the completed current checkpoint
CP17 is remote-lock and exact-CAS before publish; it is not main-last
GitHub /user login and immutable numeric actor id must both match
repository full name and immutable numeric repository id must both match
release authority requires live repository admin permission
every release action must be explicitly authorized by live authority evidence
immutable release capability is required before remote release mutation
ruleset read and write capability is required for promotion and tag protection
live observed authority must bind the accepted authority payload digest
the source is an ignored private log and the redaction policy names explicit fields
redaction is allowed only for ignored private logs
release public surfaces fail closed and cannot be made publishable by redaction
the sanitizer must bind the exact private input digest before producing output
Draft and Published Release projections must remain non-prerelease across persisted and fresh identities
